dsl_rule.translation_notes: Short Black Candlestick pattern defined by: (1) close < open (black/bearish candle), (2) small body relative to ATR, (3) upper wick smaller than body, (4) lower wick smaller than body. Exit on reversal when close > open. Direction set to SHORT based on breakout_direction parameter. Success rates from source (52% bull reversal, 53% bear continuation) noted but not directly encoded as conditions. Hold period set conservatively to 5 days.

source_rule_text: Short Black Candlestick: A candlestick that opens at one level, moves up and down a small amount, and closes lower, with small change from high to low and shadows smaller than the body height
